name: Vvveb
tagline: Powerful and easy to use cms to build websites, blogs or ecommerce stores.
description:
Powerful and easy to use cms to build websites, blogs or ecommerce stores.

Docs: https://docs.vvveb.com?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  vvveb:
    image: vvveb/vvvebcms:latest
    volumes:
      - vvveb-data:/var/www/html
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://127.0.0.1
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42134:80
volumes:
  vvveb-data: null
